dailyNews.title: Middle East war: Oil crisis from US-Iran war could boost China’s EV makers as fuel prices surge, says report
dailyNews.description: Middle East war: Beijing's shift to renewable energy and electric vehicles has reduced its oil consumption by at least 10%. The ongoing Middle East conflict may further benefit China's EV industry, as higher oil prices drive global expansion, particularly in Asia.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s war briefings feature daily video clips of US military strikes on Iran: Report
dailyNews.description: Each montage typically runs for about two minutes, though some have been longer, according to the report.

dailyNews.title: Silver prices surge by 6 per cent after 10 days of slump. Check rates here
dailyNews.description: Analysts attributed the rebound of Silver prices to strong positive sentiment in global precious metals markets and a weaker US dollar.

dailyNews.description: Emily Gregory's victory in the previously GOP-held district is the latest Democratic upset before November midterms.

dailyNews.title: ‘Shameful, insensitive’: Supreme Court raps Haryana Police over probe into 3-year-old's rape in Gurgaon, SIT formed
dailyNews.description: The top court issued show cause notices to officials of Gurugram Police and asked them why action should not be taken against them for shoddy investigation in the case

dailyNews.title: ‘US lost initiative weeks ago’: Former MI6 chief Alex Younger says Iran now holds upper hand in West Asia war
dailyNews.description: Former MI6 chief Alex Younger asserts Iran has gained the upper hand in its conflict with the US, aided by strategic decisions and a perceived civilizational war. The potential for US-Iran negotiations exists, with Pakistan offering to mediate talks.

dailyNews.title: Former Olympic star's son dies after getting caught up in avalanche
dailyNews.description: Former Canadian Olympic star John Smart announced on Monday that his son, Kai, died after suffering injuries in an avalanche while skiing in Japan.

dailyNews.title: Kamala Harris' media project goes after Jake Tapper: 'Cosplaying' Gen Z creators with podcast mic stunt
dailyNews.description: Former Vice President Kamala Harris' Headquarters accuses Jake Tapper of cosplaying Gen Z content creators, saying a podcast mic won't make CNN relevant again.

dailyNews.title: Alito blasts lawyer's word-salad blurring asylum law
dailyNews.description: Supreme Court Justice Alito challenges whether migrants stopped at the border have “arrived" in the U.S., a question that could reshape asylum eligibility.

dailyNews.title: Utah mom accused of kidnapping son's alleged bully, threatening him
dailyNews.description: A Utah mother faces felony charges in Provo after allegedly kidnapping a boy accused of bullying her son and threatening him, officials said.

dailyNews.title: US strikes against Iran-backed militias in Iraq reportedly continue as Baghdad warns of 'right to respond'
dailyNews.description: Iraq's Prime Minister al-Sudani threatened to confront and respond to U.S. airstrikes on PMF headquarters, calling the attacks violations of Iraqi sovereignty.

dailyNews.title: Mysterious noise plagues 3 neighboring towns, leaving residents exhausted and shaken
dailyNews.description: New Jersey residents across the Hudson River say mysterious late-night music is rattling homes and disrupting sleep. It's been nearly impossible to identify the source.

dailyNews.title: Trump, Who Calls Mail-in Voting ‘Cheating,’ Just Voted by Mail
dailyNews.description: President Trump has long fixated on mail-in voting to bolster his baseless claims of widespread voter fraud. But he recently used the method in a Florida special election.

dailyNews.title: Inside Trump’s Secret Deal to Deport Migrants to Cameroon
dailyNews.description: In Cameroon, the Trump administration found a partner it could pressure into accepting covertly deported migrants.

dailyNews.title: Iran mocks Trump, rejects points suggested by U.S. for peace talks
dailyNews.description: Iran's state media say the regime has rejected points suggested by the Trump administration as the basis of a potential peace deal.

dailyNews.title: Trump voted by mail in Florida despite calling mail-in voting "cheating"
dailyNews.description: President Trump has long railed against mail-in voting, but used the method this month in a Florida election, public records indicate.

dailyNews.title: Stock market, oil prices react to Trump's Iran negotiation claims
dailyNews.description: Oil prices dropped with news of possible U.S.-Iran peace talks. Isabel Wang, a markets reporter for MarketWatch, joins with more.

dailyNews.title: Iran's military ridicules Trump's claims that negotiations are underway
dailyNews.description: President Trump told reporters Tuesday that negotiations with Iran were underway, but an Iranian military spokesperson publicly ridiculed Mr. Trump's claims on Wednesday. CBS News' Aaron Navarro and Chris Livesay have more.

dailyNews.title: Iran rejects U.S. ceasefire offer, demands sovereignty over Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has claimed the U.S. and Iran are "in negotiations now." But the Islamic Republic denies any direct talks to end the war.

dailyNews.title: Former SEC Chair Jay Clayton says regulators would scrutinize trading ahead of Trump post
dailyNews.description: "Any move like that in advance of any announcement, the regulators are going to look at," said Clayton, former SEC chair.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.
